children.name: navbar_type
children.label: Navigation Type
children.help_text: Simple Navigation / Advance Navigation to more customizable
children.placeholder: Choose The Type Of The Navigation

children.name: mega_menu_type
children.label: Mega Menu Category
children.help_text:
Mega Menu Links: Add navigation links only
Mega Menu Featured: Add navigation links and a featured image card

children.name: override_options
children.label: Override Options
children.help_text: This will be overwrite the SVG fill color with the selected option.

children.name: redirect_link
children.label: Redirect Link
children.help_text: Clicking the logo will redirect to this link

children.name: sticky_navbar
children.label: Enable Sticky Navbar
children.inline_help_text: Enable to make the navbar stick to the top on scroll.

children.name: floating_navbar
children.label: Enable Floating Style
children.inline_help_text: Enable this to detach the navbar from the top of the window. This allows your Hero/Banner section to start at the absolute top (0px) of the page, appearing behind the transparent floating navbar.

children.name: search_icon
children.label: Search Icon
children.default: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M17 17L21 21" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M19 11C19 6.58172 15.4183 3 11 3C6.58172 3 3 6.58172 3 11C3 15.4183 6.58172 19 11 19C15.4183 19 19 15.4183 19 11Z" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

children.label: Use custom search results page
children.name: use_custom_search_results_template
children.inline_help_text: Turn this setting on to use a custom search results page instead of the default global search results page.

children.label: Search results page
children.name: path_id
children.inline_help_text: This is where people will go when they click to search their search term. Make sure to choose a page that contains the search results module.

default.search_icon: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M17 17L21 21" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M19 11C19 6.58172 15.4183 3 11 3C6.58172 3 3 6.58172 3 11C3 15.4183 6.58172 19 11 19C15.4183 19 19 15.4183 19 11Z" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

children.help_text: Language Switcher will be show or not on
